title: anthemis chrysantha
intro: Anthemis chrysantha, also known as yellow chamomile, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthemis chrysantha include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as soothing digestive issues and skin irritations. Anthemis chrysantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of depression, anxiety disorders, and menopausal symptoms.
